headline: Leidos To Support Over 4.7 Million Service Members and Families Through Military OneSource
summary: RESTON, VA / ACCESS Newswire / May 21, 2026 / More than 4.7 million Department of War service members and family members will continue to receive comprehensive well-being services through Military OneSource, supported by Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) through ...

headline: Leidos to help strengthen global IT operations for the U.S. Department of State under Evolve contract
summary: Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) is set to help modernize IT systems U.S. diplomats rely on worldwide through four awards under the U.S. Department of State's Evolve contract.

raw.headline: Leidos to help strengthen global IT operations for the U.S. Department of State under Evolve contract
raw.summary: Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) is set to help modernize IT systems U.S. diplomats rely on worldwide through four awards under the U.S. Department of State's Evolve contract.

headline: Leidos Receives Four Awards Under State Department's Evolve Contract
summary: Through Evolve, Leidos is ready to support secure access to critical systems and data across the State Department's global network. This includes strengthening cybersecurity, modernizing applications and infrastructure

raw.headline: Leidos Receives Four Awards Under State Department's Evolve Contract

headline: New US$2.7 Billion Hypersonic Weapons Contract Might Change The Case For Investing In Leidos Holdings (LDOS)
summary: Earlier in May 2026, America's warfighters announced they will receive an initial 3,000 Leidos Low-Cost Containerized Munitions under a Department of War framework agreement, alongside a US$2.70 billion U.S. Army contract for Leidos to advance hypersonic weapons from prototyping to production. Together, these awards highlight Leidos’ expanding role in U.S. precision strike and hypersonic programs, underpinned by company-funded missile development and planned manufacturing expansion in...
